title: 12 Way Electrical Connector Strip, Chocolate Terminal Blocks - Pack of 10 (30 Amp)
features: Package contains: 10x Electrical Connector Strips (12 Ways per strip)

Easy-Cut, Captive Screws & Raised for Easy Wiring. Screw holes between each block for quick and secure mounting. Each terminal block has the Current and Voltage rating imprinted below the terminal strip. This allows you to quickly identify the terminal block, should you forget in the future. Transparent design allows for safe and efficient connection.
CE Marked | Length: 165mm | Rated Voltage: 400V | Rated Current: 30-76 Amp | Operating Temp: +80°C | Material: PE(Housing) Brass(Terminals) Galvanised(Srews)
description: Product Description 12WSC3A 12WSC5A 12WSC10A 12WSC15A 12WSC30A 12WSC60A Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 399 4.6 out of 5 stars 399 4.6 out of 5 stars 399 4.6 out of 5 stars 399 4.6 out of 5 stars 399 4.6 out of 5 stars 399 Price £6.75 £ 6 . 75 £8.25 £ 8 . 25 £8.75 £ 8 . 75 £9.75 £ 9 . 75 £13.75 £ 13 . 75 £23.25 £ 23 . 25 CSA (mm²) 4.0 6.0 10.0 12.0 16.0 25.0 Rated Current 3 Amp 6 Amp 10 Amp 15 Amp 30 Amp 60 Amp Rated Voltage 380 V 380 V 400 V 400 V 400 V 400 V Length (mm) 93 115 129 137 165 187 Diameter D1 (mm) 2.8 3.3 4.3 4.5 5.5 6.5 Diameter D2 (mm) 2.3 2.6 2.8 2.8 3.0 3.8 Centers D (mm) 7.8 10.0 11.0 12.0 14.0 16.5 Height H (mm) 13.6 15.0 16.2 18.8 19.8 25.5 ArmaKit - Electrical Connector Strips The design of the 12-Way Electrical Connector strip allows for quick, secure and low-cost connection of electrical wires. Once the wires are correctly placed, the flat head screws in the terminal make securing the wires simple and easy. Available in a wide range of sizes and current ratings from 5-60 Amp and suitable for cables of 6-25mm² cross-sectional area. Re-Usable ✔ 12-Way Electrical Connector Strips Also known as Terminal Blocks, Chocolate Blocks Terminal Blocks are generally used for connecting electrical wires or grounding electrical switches and/or outlets in domestic and commercial applications. Due to the design, the exact number of required terminals can be quickly cut from the strip saving space and the unused blocks saved for use on another job. The transparent housing of our Connector Strips ensures, the electrician has less guess work in whether or not the wires were properly secured within the terminal. CE Marked ✔ Wide range of wire sizes and currents ✔ Low cost, maintenance free connection ✔ Corrosion resistant, high-temperature rating ✔ How To Use Step 1 Cut required number of connectors from full strip using a Stanley knife. Step 2 Strip wire back to specified length. Step 3 Insert wire and screw down terminal until securely fastened being careful not to over-tighten. Step 4 (Optional) Mount strip to surface using provided mounting holes in-between connectors. Technical Specifications Standards: CE Marked Rated Voltage: 380V to 400V Operating Temperature: -15°C to +85°C Housing Material: Polyethylene Insert Material: Brass Screw Material: Galvanised Steel
